events.ordering: wire order on one HTTP response

events.name: error
events.notes: Structured safety refusals also include code, policyVersion, categories, and refusalId without raw prompt content.

workerArtifacts.notes: Structured row/publishable/reviewQueue result; no artifactKind discriminator in the internal envelope.

The artifact remains fixture maturity; its delivery subpath has protected sandbox proof. The retained envelope is byte-free and job-bound, exact digest-addressed ONNX bytes use S3-compatible storage, and the hover fixture is executable; unsupported fixture tasks remain held.

The legacy adapter retains a held dataset/warmstart envelope. The native command executes exact source-bound behavior cloning followed by recipe-owned randomized PPO and emits a normal policy envelope; the unchanged scorecard remains the sole export authority.

D59 adds internal forge-codesign-evaluation/1.0.0 and forge-codesign-native-evaluation/1.0.0: exact Gateway snapshot plus recomputed replace-only patch/hash lineage, sovereign validator, real Rapier 0.33.0, and two estimator-only MuJoCo 3.9.0 rollouts. D60/D63 add forge-codesign-search-plan/2.0.0, p9-search-plan-evidence/2.0.0, and forge-codesign-proposal-runtime-authority/1.0.0: real pinned cmaes 0.13.0 and Optuna TPE 4.9.0 emit 100 proposals each while exact-runtime authority partitions replay/cache/recovery. Protected D64 v3 binds exact equipped catalog battery revisions, row/review/license authority, and 200-row same-authority recovery. Protected D65 adds trainingMuJoCoBundle 3.0.0, forge-training-catalog-physics/1.0.0, forge-codesign-engine-batch/4.0.0, and forge-codesign-training-authority/1.0.0: exact catalog mass/inertia and compiled MuJoCo mass closure are bound per rollout, while bench tables are used only when battery-voltage and prop applicability match. Protected D67 adds trainingMuJoCoBundle 4.0.0, forge-training-catalog-physics/2.0.0, forge-training-catalog-curve-readback/1.0.0, forge-codesign-engine-batch/5.0.0, and forge-codesign-training-authority/2.0.0: every SI bench point is retained and Python independently reconstructs all 101 curve points before table-driven authority. A controlled-synthetic v2 grid proves this path; the current 6S/5x4.6 row remains v1, retained, and rejected for the 4S/5x4.3 fixture, whose analytic fallbacks stay explicit. The lane remains outside the queue and does not prove sourced applicable catalog thrust, owner review, portable recovery, an overnight/provider-billed schedule, trained finalists, build, hardware, or field authority.

D57 adds internal forge-ghost-overlay/1.0.0: a bounded ten-minute/6,001-point indexed Y-up/SI view with controlled-synthetic or unverified maturity and permanent device/recorded-device/field nonclaims. Raw recorder frames remain object-backed.
